hero.name: by Ariel Molina
hero.tagline: Frontend architect specializing in <0>scalable infrastructures</0>, design systems, and developer experience.

about_preview.title: About Me
content: I'm a Frontend Technical Lead and Architect with over 8 years of experience building modular and scalable interface systems. My work focuses on frontend architecture, design systems, and developer experience (DX).

At EFEX, I lead the frontend infrastructure, designing platforms based on micro-frontends using Nx, React, and internal tools I've developed to automate releases, control quality, and manage design tokens.

about.title: About Me
about.tagline: Crafting scalable digital platforms with the resilience of obsidian and the precision of code.
about.description: I lead frontend squads and architect micro-frontend platforms that scale — currently powering $100M+ USD in monthly transaction volume at EFEX.

summary.title: Professional Journey
content: I'm a Staff Frontend Engineer with 9+ years of experience building modular, scalable UI platforms for fintech and enterprise environments. My work spans frontend architecture, design systems, and developer experience (DX).

At EFEX, I lead the Frontend Squad and own the technical transformation from monolithic to micro-frontend architecture using Webpack Module Federation and Nx — growing the platform from $25M to $100M+ USD in monthly transaction volume and reducing time-to-market by 70%. I design multi-package design systems (MUI + Style Dictionary) and build CI/CD automation tooling.
My passion is building autonomous systems that empower teams — not just writing good code.

education.title: Education
education.description: Universidad Latinoamericana (ULA), Mexico City. Also completed Computer Systems Engineering coursework at Escuela Superior de Cómputo (ESCOM – IPN).

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: I'm passionate about connecting with fellow developers and sharing experiences. Whether you want to discuss frontend architecture, exchange insights, or explore collaborative ideas, I'd love to hear from you.
